basic_details.short_information: Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Assistant Manager. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 11-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UCSL official website cochinshipyard.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Electrical/Mechanical/Marine/Naval Architecture Engineering or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical/Mechatronics/Marine/Shipbuilding Engineering.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: UCSL Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
